reason: Verify implementation matches requirements and acceptance criteria
Verify JWT/bcrypt/refresh token implementation follows researched patterns
Verify frontend auth flow matches React Router v7 Data mode patterns
Check DB layer follows aiosqlite raw SQL conventions
Check bcrypt is wrapped with asyncio.to_thread, no blocking calls in async context
Check auth UI components follow naming and styling conventions
Check TypeScript types for auth are properly defined
Check frontend-backend auth contract consistency (token format, error codes, CORS)
